name: sample_ID
description: Unique identifier assigned to each soil sample, constructed from various elements to ensure traceability.

name: sample_name
description: Unique identifier assigned to each soil sample, combining field number, replicate number, depth interval, and location.

name: ID_field
description: Identifier representing the specific field from which the soil sample was collected.

name: ID_profile
description: Identifier indicating the within-field replicate number for the soil sample.

name: ID_depth
description: Identifier denoting the depth interval from which the soil sample was taken, with 'A' for 0–5 cm and 'B' for 15–20 cm.

name: ID_location
description: Identifier representing the administrative location of the sample, where 'ATP' corresponds to Attapeu and 'KHA' corresponds to Khammouane.

name: depth
description: Soil depth interval from the soil surface over which the soil sample was collected, measured in centimeters.

name: landuse
description: Categorical variable indicating the land-use type under which the soil sample was collected.

name: volum_cylinder_cm3
description: Volume of the soil sampling cylinder used to collect an undisturbed soil sample for bulk density determination, measured in cubic centimeters.

name: wet_mass_soil_g
description: Mass of the soil sample immediately after collection, including water content, measured in grams.

name: dry_mass_soil_g
description: Mass of the soil sample after oven-drying at 105 °C until constant weight, representing the dry mass of soil, measured in grams.

name: bulk_density
description: Dry mass of soil per unit volume, including pore space, measured using a soil sampling cylinder and expressed in grams per cubic centimeter.

name: water_content
description: Mass of water in the soil per unit dry mass of soil, determined by oven-drying the soil, expressed as a percentage (w/w).

name: collection_date
description: Date when the soil sampling was conducted, formatted as YYYY-MM.

name: latitude
description: Latitude of the geographic location where the soil sample was collected, expressed in decimal degrees (WGS84).

name: longitude
description: Longitude of the geographic location where the soil sample was collected, expressed in decimal degrees (WGS84).

name: elevation
description: Elevation of the location where the soil sample was collected, measured relative to sea level in meters.

name: location
description: Administrative province where the soil sample was collected.

name: country
description: Country in which the soil sample was collected, represented by the ISO country code for Laos (LA).
